message.thinking:
We need to produce JSON array with 3 objects. Each object has keys: "question", "feedback", "complies". The "question" field should be one word: "Chapters", "Description", or "Structure" depending on which question. Provide feedback: text with issues or strengths. "complies" boolean.

We have text: "Īss katras noslēguma darba nodaļas un pielikumu satura apraksts." Means "Brief description of the content of each final work chapter and appendix." It's just a single sentence. Does it list main sections? No. So question 1: Chapters: Does the text list the main sections? No. So fails. Provide feedback: It doesn't list sections. Complies false.

Question 2: Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? No. It's just a statement that it's a brief description, but not actual description. So fails. Provide feedback: No actual descriptions. Complies false.

Question 3: Structure: Can it be easily understood what general structure is from this text? No. So fails. Provide feedback: No structure. Complies false.

Thus all three false. Provide array with three objects. Ensure JSON formatting.
